text: implement projects selection for mobile app. path to the .bowman directory...
description:
Implement project/directory selection UI for the native Android mobile app to let users choose which .bowman directory to open.

**Part of:** Native Android voice interface (aim 93149e0b)

**Blocked by:** Parent aim requires human decisions on tech stack, voice API, connectivity model, and overall mobile strategy.

**Implementation notes when unblocked:**
- Android file picker for directory selection
- Persist selected project path in app preferences
- Validate .bowman directory structure
- Handle permissions for filesystem access

status.comment: Blocked by parent mobile app strategy decisions - see aim 93149e0b
